profile.name: Jaya Prakash V
profile.title: Frontend Developer
profile.subtitle: React.js · MERN Stack · JavaScript
profile.about:
I'm a Results-driven Frontend Developer with hands-on experience building scalable web applications using React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), and the MERN Stack. Currently developing a real-time Movie Ticket Booking System at Nithra Apps.

I'm passionate about performance, clean architecture, and building user-centric interfaces — from real-time seat locking systems to WebRTC-powered video calling platforms.

projects.title: Task Assigning Platform
projects.desc: Full-stack real-time collaboration platform with role-based dashboards for Admin, Manager, Lead & Employee roles.
highlights: Real-time task & ticket management with live updates via Socket.IO WebSocket
WebRTC-based peer-to-peer audio/video calling for team communication
In-app messaging with emoji support, @mention tagging & file attachments
Granular RBAC across all user roles with JWT authentication
Dark-themed UI with React.js, Tailwind CSS & WebGL animations (OGL)

projects.title: Movie Ticket Booking System
projects.desc: Scalable full-stack movie booking platform with separate dashboards for user, admin & partner roles and real-time seat locking.
highlights: Real-time seat locking mechanism to eliminate duplicate bookings
Secure JWT-based authentication with granular role-based access control
Fully responsive UI with React.js and Tailwind CSS for all devices
Efficient MongoDB schema design for bookings, seats & users

points: Developed a scalable full-stack MERN Stack web application for a real-time movie ticket booking platform.
Designed and implemented fully responsive UI using React.js and Tailwind CSS, ensuring cross-device compatibility.
Implemented JWT-based authentication and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for user, admin, and partner roles.
Optimized frontend performance through code splitting, lazy loading & reusable component architecture.
Monitored & analyzed agent calls to ensure accurate troubleshooting and process adherence.
Conducted technical training sessions to reduce NPU and improve resolution quality.
Tracked performance & NPU reports to identify trends and areas of improvement.
Previously worked as Level One AV Agent — 9 months handling Television & Soundbar support.
Executed client-based data projects with timely and accurate delivery.
Managed & validated data using Microsoft Excel with VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables & Charts.
